# Regex patterns (ERE) that MUST NOT appear in the rendered hermes.container.
# One per line; blank lines and #-comments are skipped. If any pattern matches,
# _check_quadlet fails. These guard the hardening the README promises.

# Privilege escapes
--privileged
^Privileged=true
^CapAdd=
# NOTE: AddCapability= is intentionally ALLOWED here — a minimal, EXACT set
# (CHOWN DAC_OVERRIDE FOWNER SETGID SETUID, needed by the image's s6 init to
# drop to its unprivileged app user) is pinned as a required exact-match in
# quadlet-required.txt, so any broader/different cap set still fails the suite.
# _check_quadlet also asserts exactly ONE AddCapability= line, so an EXTRA cap
# line (with the sanctioned one still present) can't slip past either list.

# Sandbox bypass
seccomp=unconfined
apparmor=unconfined

# Container sockets — would make agent escape host-root-equivalent
docker\.sock
podman\.sock

# Public binding — never publish on a shared/public VM
PublishPort=[^#]*0\.0\.0\.0:

# UserNS overrides — see template comment about why we don't set this
^UserNS=
